name: LLMpulse
description: Shows the climate impact of your Claude Code usage in the GNOME top bar. The indicator shows a tree-equivalent count (🌲) based on tokens burned; the dropdown reports energy, CO₂, water, and a rotating sarcastic verdict. Ships with the llmpulse CLI for a full climate-guilt report in the terminal. Requires the ccusage CLI (npm install -g ccusage).
